name: @ont/publisher
description: ONT clean runnable publisher service. Split HTTP shell over @ont/adapter-publisher: /assemble/* return the unsigned tx and never broadcast; /broadcast is the only port-owning route and relays an already-signed legacy raw. No signing, private accumulator, or live network in tests.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-publisher && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-da && npm run build -w @ont/node-live && vitest run
